productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Tennis Mas T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite  round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a distressed look graphic  print  that continues to the back and grey fabric tape on inseam of the neckline FittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron, but do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Get ready to play hard in this white Athletic Department  t-shirt from nike. The distressed look pink background of the image is offset by the bold black sketch of a tennis player. The image continues to the back and gives a big dose of edgy aggressive spirit to the tee. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a casual look.
